inboxDir.description: Directory to watch for incoming bridge messages. Defaults to ~/.agent-bridge/inbox.

keysDir.description: Directory holding SSH keys for SCP outbound replies. Defaults to ~/.agent-bridge/keys.

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for inbox watcher. Default: 2000.

machineName.description: Local machine name used as the 'from' field on outbound BridgeMessages. Defaults to hostname.

fanOutChannel.description: When the agent replies, also deliver to this channel id (e.g. 'telegram'). Optional.

fanOutAccount.description: Channel account id for fan-out delivery. Optional.

fanOutTarget.description: Default chat target for fan-out delivery. Optional.
